article.description: Article BODY in Ukrainian markdown. NO title, NO metadata, NO 'Title:' prefix — just paragraphs starting with the hook sentence.

tags.description: Topic tags in Ukrainian (e.g. сон, харчування, дослідження)

source_urls.description: Source URLs (PubMed, journals, WHO, official pages)

evidence_level.description: Overall evidence strength of the article's claims

medical_disclaimer.description: True if article contains advice that warrants 'consult your doctor' disclaimer

image_prompt.description: Wellness illustration prompt in English for DALL-E

summary.description: Factual summary (1-2 paragraphs): main finding, key evidence, practical takeaway, evidence strength. Used for editorial planning to avoid topic repetition.
